artifact: Dao De Jing 21 — Shadow of Virtue
english: Great virtue takes its form only by following the Way.
spanish: La gran virtud toma forma sólo siguiendo el Camino.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 21
notes: Mode A queue. Digitized Dao De Jing witness used comparatively; canonical Chinese anchor is Chinese Text Project. Short working rendering.

artifact: Dao De Jing 22 — Bent Becomes Whole
english: What bends becomes whole; what yields becomes straight.
spanish: Lo que se dobla se completa; lo que cede se endereza.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 22
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: Few words belong to what is natural.
spanish: Pocas palabras pertenecen a lo natural.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 23
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

artifact: Dao De Jing 24 — Standing on Tiptoe
english: The one on tiptoe does not stand; the one who strides too far does not walk.
spanish: Quien se empina no se sostiene; quien avanza demasiado no camina.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 24
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

artifact: Dao De Jing 25 — Before Heaven and Earth
english: There is something formed in mystery, born before heaven and earth.
spanish: Hay algo formado en misterio, nacido antes del cielo y la tierra.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 25
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: The heavy is the root of the light; stillness governs agitation.
spanish: Lo pesado es raíz de lo ligero; la quietud gobierna la agitación.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 26
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: Good walking leaves no track.
spanish: El buen caminar no deja huella.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 27
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

artifact: Dao De Jing 28 — Know White, Keep Black
original: 知其白，守其黑，為天下式。
english: Know the white, keep to the black, and become a pattern for the world.
spanish: Conoce lo blanco, guarda lo negro, y vuélvete modelo para el mundo.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 28
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: The world is a sacred vessel; it cannot be forced.
spanish: El mundo es un vaso sagrado; no puede forzarse.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 29
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: Where armies have camped, thorns and brambles grow.
spanish: Donde han acampado los ejércitos, crecen espinas y zarzas.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 30
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: Weapons are instruments of ill omen.
spanish: Las armas son instrumentos de mal augurio.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 31
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

original: 道常無名，樸雖小，天下莫能臣也。
english: The constant Way has no name; the uncarved block is small, yet nothing can rule it.
spanish: El Camino constante no tiene nombre; el bloque sin tallar es pequeño, pero nada lo domina.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 32
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: To know others is intelligence; to know oneself is clarity.
spanish: Conocer a otros es inteligencia; conocerse a sí mismo es claridad.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 33
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

artifact: Dao De Jing 34 — Great Way Overflows
english: The Great Way overflows; it can go left or right.
spanish: El Gran Camino desborda; puede ir a izquierda o derecha.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 34
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: Hold the great image, and the world comes to it.
spanish: Sostén la gran imagen, y el mundo acude a ella.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 35
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: If something is to contract, it must first have expanded.
spanish: Si algo va a contraerse, primero tuvo que expandirse.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 36
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: The Way constantly does nothing, yet nothing is left undone.
spanish: El Camino no actúa constantemente, y sin embargo nada queda sin hacerse.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 37
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: Highest virtue does not cling to virtue; therefore it has virtue.
spanish: La virtud más alta no se aferra a la virtud; por eso tiene virtud.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 38
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: Those of old attained the One.
spanish: Los antiguos alcanzaron el Uno.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 39
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: Returning is the movement of the Way.
spanish: Retornar es el movimiento del Camino.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 40
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: The great sound is barely heard; the great image has no form.
spanish: El gran sonido apenas se oye; la gran imagen no tiene forma.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 41
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

artifact: Dao De Jing 42 — One, Two, Three
original: 道生一，一生二，二生三，三生萬物。
english: The Way gives birth to one; one to two; two to three; three to the ten thousand things.
spanish: El Camino engendra uno; uno engendra dos; dos engendra tres; tres engendra las diez mil cosas.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 42
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

original: 天下之至柔，馳騁天下之至堅。
english: The softest thing in the world runs through the hardest thing in the world.
spanish: Lo más blando del mundo atraviesa lo más duro del mundo.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 43
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

artifact: Dao De Jing 44 — Name or Body
english: Name or body: which is closer?
spanish: Nombre o cuerpo: ¿cuál está más cerca?
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 44
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: Great completion seems deficient; its use is never exhausted.
spanish: La gran completitud parece deficiente; su uso nunca se agota.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 45
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

english: To know the sufficiency of enough is lasting sufficiency.
spanish: Conocer la suficiencia de lo suficiente es suficiencia duradera.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 46
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

artifact: Dao De Jing 47 — Without Going Out
english: Without going out the door, one can know the world.
spanish: Sin salir por la puerta, se puede conocer el mundo.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 47
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

artifact: Dao De Jing 48 — Less and Less
original: 為道日損。損之又損，以至於無為。
english: In pursuing the Way, one lessens daily, lessens and lessens until non-action.
spanish: Al seguir el Camino, se disminuye día a día, se disminuye hasta la no-acción.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 48
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

artifact: Dao De Jing 49 — No Fixed Heart
original: 聖人無常心，以百姓心為心。
english: The sage has no fixed heart; the people's hearts become the sage's heart.
spanish: El sabio no tiene corazón fijo; los corazones del pueblo se vuelven su corazón.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 49
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.

artifact: Dao De Jing 50 — Entering Life, Entering Death
english: One comes out into life and enters into death.
spanish: Se sale hacia la vida y se entra en la muerte.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 50
notes: Mode A queue. Short working rendering from canonical Chinese.
